html:
The Pretty Parasol is an item that provides protection against Rain and Overheating. It requires 4 Twigs, 3 Cut Grass, and 6 Petals to craft and is available from the beginning of the game. It can also be used as a Fuel, providing the same burn time as a Log. Like the Garland, the Pretty Parasol does not have durability but instead spoils over time.

It provides 120 points of protection from Overheating and 50% protection from Wetness, but it does not protect player from Lightning.

With the Seasonal Starting Items default preset, the Pretty Parasol will be given to any players joining a world for the first time, during Summer.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Hand-me-down Collection
Rosy Posy Parasol
"April showers bring May flowers."

Tips

  • One of Pearl's quests requires the player to give her a rain insulation item while it's raining. Since another one of her quests requires you to plant ten Flowers on her island, the player can then pick these Flowers to craft a Pretty Parasol as soon as it starts to rain. This way the player doesn't need to give her the more expensive Umbrella.
  • Due to its cheap cost, as a temporary measure, it can be an effective alternative to the Umbrella in Spring.

Trivia

  • The Pretty Parasol was first introduced in the Reign of Giants DLC and was also present in the Hamlet DLC. It was then added to the base game in the Hamlet Early Access beta branch on April 18, 2019.
  • The Pretty Parasol is unavailable for crafting in the Shipwrecked DLC unless playing as Wagstaff, which instead has the Tropical Parasol.

Gallery

  • Pretty Parasol Equipped.
  • A Pretty Parasol being used.
  • The "Add Fuel" option when placed over a fire.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

"grass_umbrella"
“This will keep my hair moderately dry, at least.”
–Wilson
“Pretty as can be!”
–Willow
“I do not like tiny umbrella.”
–Wolfgang
“The sun beats down.”
–Wendy
“MODERATE STRENGTH PROTECTIVE SCREEN”
–WX-78
“A dainty parasol that will provide moderate protection.”
–Wickerbottom
“That there could keep my beard moderately dry, eh?”
–Woodie
“It's more "pretty" than "dapper".”
–Maxwell
“Its translucency provides little protection.”
–Wagstaff
“I dislike flöwers, but I dislike wet armör möre.”
–Wigfrid
“It won't keep us from playing in puddles!”
–Webber
“This should keep me almost dry.”
–Walani
“A bit of shade is better than none.”
–Warly
“A lil water ne'er hurt nobody.”
–Woodlegs
“IT KEEP'TH WILBA DRY”
–Wilba
“Rain Taker made of friend hair”
–Wormwood
“It's pretty. Pretty useful.”
–Wheeler
“Better than nothing.”
–Winona
“A tool to keep the rain away.”
–Wortox
“Don't see what so pretty about it.”
–Wurt
“Flowers actually have lots of practical uses.”
–Walter
“Quite the afternoonified rain napper, isn't it?”
–Wanda
The Pretty Parasol is an item that provides protection against Rain and Overheating. It requires 4 Twigs, 3 Cut Grass, and 6 Petals to craft and is available from the beginning of the game. It provides 120 points of protection from Overheating and 50% protection from Wetness, but it does not protect player from Lightning.
With the Seasonal Starting Items default preset, the Pretty Parasol will be given to any players joining a world for the first time, during Summer.

This way the player doesn't need to give her the more expensive Umbrella.
